segments.text: Hi everyone and welcome. I'm Crystal
Smith, product marketing lead for the
Google Developer Program and I'm
thrilled to be here at Google IO to talk
to you about something incredibly vital
for all of us building the future of
technology, the Google Developer
Program. With me today are two key
members of the team who are deeply
involved in shaping and delivering the
value of this program to developers
around the globe.
Hi everyone. I'm Katriel Vasneno, senior
engineering program manager for the
Google Developer Program. And I'm
Jeffrey Taylor, lead technical writer
for the Google Developer Program. At the
heart of it, the Google Developer
Program isn't simply another initiative.
It's Google's demonstration of a deeply
rooted understanding that developers are
the architects of our digital future and
the vital engine of today's innovation
within today's technological ecosystem.
You, the developer, stand at the
forefront of creating the next
generation of applications, services,
and experiences that will shape how we
live, work, and interact with the world.
From crafting groundbreaking AI
solutions to building scalable cloud
applications and developing engaging
mobile experiences, your expertise and
ingenuity are paramount to leveraging
the full potential of Google's
cuttingedge
technologies. In today's landscape,
developers are the essential catalysts
for digital transformation across all
industries. Your ability to translate
complex ideas into tangible software
solutions drives business growth
enhances user experiences and addresses
critical societal challenges. Whether
it's enabling small businesses to reach
global markets, empowering enterprises
to streamline operations, or creating
tools that enhance accessibility, your
work forms the very foundation of the
digital
economy. The demand for skilled
developers is ever increasing,
underscoring your crucial role in
meeting the evolving technological needs
of our world.
Looking ahead, developers will be even
more instrumental in navigating the
transformative power of emerging
technologies like artificial
intelligence and machine learning. As we
stand on the cusp of an age defined by
AIdriven innovation, your ability to
harness these tools to build intelligent
applications, automate complex tasks,
and unlock new possibilities will be
critical. The Google Developer Program
is intentionally designed to empower you
in this era of rapid change, providing
you with early access to AI tools like
Gemini Code Assist, Vert.Ex AI, and AI
Studio along with the learning resources
and expert guidance needed to master
them.
Therefore, at its heart, the Google
Developer Program is a commitment to
fostering your growth and success within
the entire Google
ecosystem. Regardless of your current
skill level or professional aspirations,
whether you're an aspiring professional
eager to build foundational skills, an
independent developer seeking
cost-effective and powerful tools, or an
enterprise developer focused on scaling
innovative solutions, our overarching
goal is to be your central hub. We aim
to provide a comprehensive suite of
services, tools, and resources that
simplify and accelerate your development
journey, enabling you to learn the
latest skills, build innovative
solutions faster, and ultimately grow
your career, and shape the future with
Google's transformative technologies.
To best serve the diverse needs of our
developer community, the Google
Developer Program offers three distinct
membership levels: standard, premium,
and enterprise. Let's take a quick look
at each starting with our foundational
offering. Jeffrey, thanks Katriel. The
standard membership is our nocost entry
point and it's designed to provide a
solid foundation for your growth within
the Google ecosystem. We understand that
learning and building are key. So, the
standard membership offers access to a
range of valuable resources to help you
do just
that. As a standard member, you gain
access to nocost learning opportunities
on cloud skills boost and through code
labs, allowing you to build practical
skills with Google Cloud and other
technologies. You also have the ability
to organize your work, track your
progress, and showcase your
accomplishments on your Google developer
profile. This profile lets you highlight
your professional skills and
achievements and even display badges
you've
earned. Furthermore, standard members
benefit from access to AI powered
assistance like side panel chat, code
explain, and search summaries within
Google's developer documentation, making
it easier to find answers to your
technical questions. You also get 10
Firebase Studio workspaces, an increase
from the default one to help you develop
your projects in the cloud. Plus, you
can save your interests and bookmark
important pages across Google developer
sites for quick access later. And of
course, you'll stay informed with the
latest news and announcements from
Google. The standard membership is
really about giving every developer a
starting point to engage with Google
technologies and our
community. That's a fantastic overview
of the value you get at no cost,
Jeffrey. But we can also recognize that
many developers are looking for more.
More resources, more support, and deeper
integration with Google's advanced
offerings. That's where our premium
membership comes in. The premium
membership is an annual subscription
designed to help individual developers
and technical practitioners go further
faster with Google's technologies. It
builds upon the solid foundation of the
standard membership with an exclusive
set of enhanced benefits now infused
with AI to really supercharge your
development journey. We've listened to
your feedback and tailored this
membership level to provide significant
value across learning, building, and
growth within the Google ecosystem.
Let's dive into some of the key
benefits. Firstly, we provide $500 in
annual Google Cloud credits. This gives
you tangible resources to start building
and experimenting with a wide range of
Google Cloud services from compute and
storage to cutting edge AI and machine
learning platforms like Vert.ex AI and
our serverless offerings like Cloud Run
and Firebase.
This credit empowers you to prototype,
test, and even deploy your applications
on Google Cloud without immediate cost
barriers. In today's rapidly evolving
landscape, AI is a gamecher for
developer productivity. That's why
premium membership includes Gemini code
assist standard. This powerful tool uses
Google's generative AI to help you build
code faster and more efficiently right
within your IDE. Whether you're using VS
Code, Jet Brains, Cloud Workstations, or
Cloud Shell Editor, Gemini Code Assist
can provide code completions as you
type, generate entire functions from
comments, create unit tests, and assist
with debugging and understanding your
code. This isn't just about writing code
faster. It's about reducing cognitive
load, and allowing you to focus on the
bigger picture of your innovation.
And this benefit is specifically linked
to your premium membership email,
ensuring secure access. For those eager
to explore the forefront of AI, we also
include a $50 annual Geni developer
credit. This credit is specifically for
use with Google's cuttingedge APIs in
Google AI Studio and Google Cloud
Vert.Ex text AI, allowing you to
experiment with our latest generation of
models, including the powerful Gemini
family and Gen Media models like Imagin
and Vio. This benefit lets you tap into
the transformative potential of
generative AI directly within Google's
developer platforms.
We know that demonstrating your
expertise is crucial for career
advancement. That's why premium members
receive one Google Cloud certification
voucher each year, covering the full
retail value of up to
$200. Achieving a Google Cloud
certification can significantly
accelerate your career, and this voucher
makes it more accessible. Plus, as a
bonus for your achievement, upon earning
a Google Cloud certification, you'll
receive an additional $500 in Google
Cloud credits. This reinforces our
commitment to your ongoing learning and
growth within the Google Cloud
ecosystem. Sometimes you need
personalized guidance to overcome
specific challenges or optimize your
architecture. Premium members can take
advantage of a consultation with Google
Cloud experts. You can book either one
1-hour session or two 30 minute sessions
each year to get one-to-one expert
advice on topics ranging from a IML and
modern architecture to Firebase and data
analytics.
This direct access to Google Cloud
expertise can be invaluable in
accelerating your projects and making
informed technical decisions. We also
boost your development environment with
30 Firebase Studio Workspaces providing
you even more flexibility for AI
assisted fullstack app development in
the cloud. And finally, to give you a
taste of the latest in AI power
productivity, premium members receive
three months of Google 1 AI premium,
which includes access to the most
capable AI from Google's Gemini, along
with 2 TB of storage and more. As you
can see, the premium membership is
packed with value for individual
developers, but for larger teams within
organizations, we have a tailored
solution. Kreel, can you tell us about
the enterprise membership?
Absolutely, Crystal. The Google
Developer Program Enterprise Membership
is designed for organizations looking to
empower their developer teams with a
secure riskmanaged environment to test,
experiment, and prototype with access to
new Google Cloud products, features, and
tools. It's a monthly subscription
purchased by the organization with a
minimum of 10 seats and is specifically
for existing cloud customers.
A key benefit for enterprise teams is
Google Cloud Developer Sandboxes. These
dedicated, easy to use, and safe sandbox
cloud projects allow developers to gain
hands-on experience separate from
production environments. This fosters
innovation and learning without
impacting live systems. Each developer
license also comes with $150 in monthly
Google Cloud credits to use within these
sandbox projects.
This provides a consistent and
predictable resource for experimentation
and learning. Similar to the premium
membership, the enterprise membership
includes AI powered coding assistance
with Gemini code assist enterprise.
However, the enterprise edition can be
customized based on your organization's
private codebase, allowing for even more
relevant and contextaware AI assistance
across a broader range of development
tasks. This helps teams build more
efficiently while leveraging their
internal knowledge.
Managing subscriptions for a team is
simplified with central purchasing
management through enterprise cloud
billing. This streamlines administration
and provides better control over team
access. And just like with premium,
enterprise members also get unlimited
access to Google cloud skills boost for
orgs, ensuring continuous learning and
upskilling for the entire development
team. The enterprise membership truly
focuses on providing a comprehensive and
manageable environment for team- based
innovation on Google Cloud. So, as you
can see, the Google Developer Program
offers a wealth of opportunities for
developers at every stage of their
journey. From the foundational learning
and community access of the standard
membership to the enhanced resources and
personalized support of the premium
membership and the team focused secure
environment of the enterprise
membership, we're committed to providing
the tools and support you need to
succeed in the Google ecosystem. With
the Google Developer Program, we want
you to be inspired and build the
extraordinary. We believe that providing
you with the right tools, the right
knowledge, and the right connections,
you can unlock your full potential and
build truly amazing things with the best
Google has to offer. We're in the age of
AI transformation, and the Google
Developer Program is your catalyst for
growth, providing access to cutting edge
tools you need to stay ahead of the
curve. We want you to be inspired by the
extraordinary achievements of developers
like you who are building the future
with Google. Whether you're looking to
enhance your skills quickly, build and
scale your applications efficiently, or
upskill your enterprise teams, the
Google Developer Program has something
to offer. We're continuously working to
expand the benefits and improve the
experience based on your feedback and
the evolving needs of the developer
community. We encourage all of you to
explore the Google Developer Program and
find the membership that best suits your
needs and
aspirations. You can learn more and sign
up at
developers.google.com/program. Take
advantage of the nocost standard
membership to get started. And if you're
ready to accelerate your journey and
deeply engage with the Google ecosystem,
we highly recommend checking out the
premium membership and the enterprise
options for your teams. Thank you for
joining us here at Google IO. We're
excited to see what you'll build next.
[Applause]
